about.title: About
about.subtitle: Full-stack developer passionate about product, user experience and software engineering.
about.bio: I'm Pedro Maciel, a full-stack developer focused on Nuxt, NestJS and TypeScript. I enjoy building complete products — from the database to the pixel — with attention to code quality, performance and user experience. This portfolio is an example: a real application with its own CMS, full authentication, i18n and AI integration.
